PROP-01b-partial1-pre-003.text: bid() must revert if no active auction exists for the asset (auctionStart == 0 or expired).
PROP-01b-partial1-pre-003.assertion: forall bid(asset,amt,data): s_auctionStarts[asset]!=0 AND elapsed<=duration => proceed; else revert

locations.note: auctionStart loaded at line 421; InvalidAuction revert if 0 or elapsed > duration
